title: Loop Returns - Return
description: A return record in Loop representing a customer-initiated post-purchase return request.

id.description: The unique identifier associated with the return.

state.description: The current lifecycle state of the return.

outcome.description: The resolution type chosen by the customer.

order_id.description: The Loop order identifier associated with the return.

order_name.description: The order name from the commerce platform.

provider_order_id.description: The order identifier from the external commerce platform (e.g., Shopify).

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for the store's default currency.

total.description: The total cost of the return.

refund.description: The amount refunded in the return.

handling_fee.description: The handling fee charged by the merchant.

return_product_total.description: The gross value of the returning items before discounts and tax.

return_tax_total.description: The total value of taxes on the returning items.

return_total.description: The net value of the returning items after discounts and tax.

exchange_total.description: The net value of the exchanges after discounts and tax.

gift_card.description: The value of the gift card issued in the return.

carrier.description: The carrier associated with the return shipment.

label_status.description: The delivery status of the return shipping label.

label_url.description: The link to the shipping label PDF.

destination_id.description: The unique identifier of the shipping destination for this return.

status_page_url.description: The URL of the Loop return tracking status page.

created_at.description: The date and time the return was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the return was last updated.
